results.title: Endrick says versatility could help Brazil against Norway
results.description: "At Lyon, I helped the team a lot playing as a number nine. I could play on the right wing and I could also play as a false nine," said the 19-year-old, who spent the second half of last season on loan in France.

results.title: Special Olympians win 6 gold medals at state meet
Fans fear for ‘suffering’ Alan Shearer as he’s compared to a ‘gammon joint in an air fryer’ in 38C heat at World Cup
results.description: ALAN SHEARER was compared to a "gammon joint in an air fryer" after a sweaty podcast appearance in Atlanta. The Newcastle and England legend was red in the face and dripping with perspiration following a brisk walk in the Georgia heat. And comedian Rob Beckett pounced on an opportunity to get one over on Shearer...

results.title: The Perishable, Never-Ending Genius of Lionel Messi
results.description: How are his legions of fans savoring what could be the last World Cup of their idol? I dove into a sea of screaming Messis to find out.

results.title: How can USMNT win without Folarin Balogun? Look how Mauricio Pochettino replaced Harry Kane
results.description: The USMNT will be without its top striker for a marquee match. It's not the first time Mauricio Pochettino has encountered that challenge
